title: The Valley of Fairies and Civilization
description: The player will have to create his own settlement and explore a wonderful world with fairies and dwarves
body:
**Fairy Valley is not just a valley, it is a world, a big Thai and an opportunity for observation. In this modpack, you will not only build your civilization and explore majestic landscapes, but also encounter unusual dungeons, each of which offers unique challenges and treasures. Discover new resources, building blocks and tasks that will immerse you in a world of adventure and discovery. Travel through the valley, where every step can lead to a new discovery, and every dungeon hides something amazing. Your acquaintance begins in the Valley of the Fairies!**

- Create and develop your civilization using new resources and building blocks.
- Discover the majestic landscapes of the valley, full of mystery and beauty.
- Explore unusual dungeons, each offering unique challenges and treasures.
- Expand your boundaries of creativity and survival by using the new features of the modpack.
